description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:4.2.2 Docker image. Define a single job named pages (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, caches the node_modules/ directory, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. The job's script should execute: npm install -g metalsmith, then npm install, then make build. No additional services or variables are needed. Deploy the built site to GitLab Pages.
